clips.title: The Bedroom
clips.prompt: Cinematic VFX, one continuous impossible move. A person stands before a tall bedroom mirror, and the camera pushes forward with them impossibly through the mirror's surface, which ripples like water, emerging into a mirror-world version of the room beyond. A person in casual clothes. Seamless mirror-portal transition, rippling surface, otherworldly, 24fps.

clips.title: The Antique
clips.prompt: Cinematic VFX, one continuous impossible move. A person reaches toward an ornate antique mirror and the camera glides with them impossibly through the glass, its surface shimmering, emerging into a fantastical dreamlike realm on the other side. A person in elegant clothes. Seamless mirror-portal transition, shimmering surface, otherworldly, 24fps.
